pages.raw_text:
In reply to a statement issued
by an official of the Traction Co.
that this company never had grant
ed the closed shop to the extent Of
discriminating against nonunion
men, an officer of the threatened
oarmen's union offers the following
as an absolute statement of fact:


~On Dec. 20 of last year we were
given the closed shop and at the
same time a 10 per cent cut In our
wages. The closed shop agreement
and promise of restoration Of the
wage scale after the financial furry
was over served to secure the
wage reduction.


Eat that time the two Maib boys
had to quit the car service because
they did not care to join the union.
There was no mention Of employ
ing nonunion men until after the
union had secured the league base
ball franchise to the Traction Co.,
and the union, like an old glove,
was considered in condition to be
thrown aside"
